name: Spicy Beef Bread- Regular Loaf
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons cream cheese, softened at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the order specified by your bread machine manufacturer's instructions.
2. Set the loaf pan into the bread machine and select the standard or regular loaf setting.
3. Close the lid securely to prevent any splatter during baking.
4. Start the kneading cycle, followed by the rising cycle until the end of mixing phase.
5. Once the dough is mixed, allow it to rest for about 10 minutes before baking.
6. Place the loaf pan into the bread machine and begin the baking cycle.
7. After baking is complete, carefully remove the bread from the machine using oven mitts.
8. Allow the bread to cool on a wire rack before slicing and serving.
Makes a 1 pound loaf.
